zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Menteith於1400年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲時，她的父親Duncan Lennox, Eighth Earl of Lennox55歲，母親Helen Campbell52歲。她於1425年之前與Murdoch Menteith在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1451年5月18日在蘇格蘭享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Menteith was born in 1400, in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Duncan Lennox, Eighth Earl of Lennox, was 55 and her mother, Helen Campbell, was 52. She married Murdoch Menteith before 1425, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 18 May 1451, in Scotland, at the age of 51.

Elle a épousé Murdoch Menteith avant 1425, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 mai 1451, à Écosse, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Menteithが1400年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアス レノックスで生まれた時，父Duncan Lennox, Eighth Earl of Lennoxは55歳，母Helen Campbellは52歳であった。1425年以前にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでMurdoch Menteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1451年5月18日にスコットランドで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Menteith(이)가 1400년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 테 렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Duncan Lennox, Eighth Earl of Lennox(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helen Campbell(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 1425년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Murdoch Menteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 5월 18일 스컷랜드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Menteith родилась в 1400 г. в местности т леннокс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Duncan Lennox, Eighth Earl of Lennox было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Campbell, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Murdoch Menteith перед 1425 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 мая 1451 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 51 год.
